name: @elizaos/plugin-personality-root
description: Agent self-modification and character evolution plugin for elizaOS
author: elizaOS

scripts.build: bun run build:ts && bun run build:rust && bun run build:python
scripts.build:rust: test -d rust && cd rust && cargo build --release || echo 'Rust build skipped'
scripts.build:python: test -d python && cd python && python3 -m build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Python build skipped'
scripts.test: bun run test:ts && bun run test:rust && bun run test:python
scripts.test:ts: cd typescript && vitest run || echo 'TypeScript tests skipped'
scripts.test:rust: test -d rust && cd rust && cargo test || echo 'Rust tests skipped'
scripts.test:python: test -d python && cd python && pytest -p no:anchorpy --asyncio-mode=auto || echo 'Python tests skipped'
scripts.lint:rust: test -d rust && cd rust && cargo clippy --all-targets --fix --allow-dirty --allow-staged -- -D warnings && cargo fmt || echo 'Rust lint skipped'
scripts.lint:python: test -d python && cd python && ruff check --fix . && ruff format . || echo 'Python lint skipped'

ENABLE_AUTO_EVOLUTION.description: Enable automatic character evolution from conversations

EVOLUTION_COOLDOWN_MS.description: Cooldown between evolution evaluations in milliseconds
